post.subject: How clean is soap?
post.body: Ive been thinking about this for a few weeks now. How Clean is Soap? So you touch the ground, house, car, banisters on stairs, your body, soap etc. Then turn on the tap rub your hands around the soap bar for about 20 seconds then rinse and dry. All clean and ready to be put in ur mouth if or eaten off? I want clean soap!

comments.body: soap is filth, YOU WILL DIE.
comments.author: silentempathy
